name: Tomato Brushetta, Lo Cal
recipeIngredient: 8 slices of French bread or Italian bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the bread.
2. Rub one side of hot toast with cut side of garlic.
3. Heat olive oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat; add onion and cook, stirring until tender.
4. Add tomato, oregano, and pepper, stir.
5. Spoon tomato mixture onto the garlic side of hot toast and serve immediately.
6. Alternatively, sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and broil for 1 minute.
Per serving (2 slices): 105 cal; 2 g fat; 1 mg cholesterol; 190 mg salt.
